scripts.dev:demo: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && cross-env NODE_ENV=production TAYLOS_DEMO_MODE=1 API_BASE_URL=https://api.taylos.ai ELECTRON_DISABLE_SECURITY_WARNINGS=1 electron .
scripts.dev:local: cross-env TAYLOS_SERVICE_TARGET=local VITE_SERVICE_TARGET=local npm run dev
scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:main && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ELECTRON_DISABLE_SECURITY_WARNINGS=1 electron .
scripts.dev:main: npm run build:main && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.build:release:mac: bash ./scripts/generate-macos-installer-assets.sh && npm run build:native:glass && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --mac --publish never && bash ./scripts/create-custom-dmg.sh && node ./scripts/update-mac-release-metadata.js
scripts.build:release:win: tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never
scripts.start:prod: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron .
scripts.test:lifecycle: npm run build:main && node --test tests/capture-session-controller.test.cjs tests/overlay-visibility-controller.test.cjs tests/realtime-renderer-contract.test.cjs tests/window-anchor-geometry.test.cjs
